mapper.select: SELECT s.schedule_id, s.start_datetime, s.end_datetime, s.class_content, s.state, m.name as memberName FROM schedule s INNER JOIN member m ON s.trainer_id = m.member_id WHERE s.member_id = #{memberId} AND s.state IN ('RESERVATION', 'COMPLETE', 'FINISH')

SELECT s.schedule_id, s.start_datetime, s.end_datetime, s.class_content, s.state, m.name as memberName FROM schedule s INNER JOIN member m ON s.member_id = m.member_id WHERE s.trainer_id = #{memberId} AND s.state IN ('RESERVATION', 'COMPLETE', 'FINISH')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO schedule (trainer_id, member_id, start_datetime, end_datetime, class_content, state) VALUES (#{trainerId}, #{request.memberId}, #{request.startDateTime}, #{request.endDateTime}, #{request.classContent}, 'RESERVATION')
